_comment: Example: How a task from TASKS.json maps to a Jira story.

_meta.description: Illustrates the relationship between spec-kit tasks and Jira stories. This is not a working gate -- it is a reference for developers wiring Jira to the governance system.

source_task.title: Implement user registration endpoint
source_task.description: Create POST /api/register with email, password, and name fields. Validate input, hash password, store user in DB, return JWT token.
acceptance_criteria: Password is hashed with bcrypt before storage
Successful registration returns 201 with JWT token

jira_story.description:
Create POST /api/register with email, password, and name fields.

Acceptance Criteria:
- POST /api/register accepts email, password, name
- Password is hashed with bcrypt before storage
- Duplicate email returns 409 Conflict
- Successful registration returns 201 with JWT token

mapping_notes.acceptance_criteria: copied into Jira description as bullet list
mapping_notes.status_sync: Jira status (To Do / In Progress / Done) maps to task status (todo / in_progress / done)
